title: NEO Frankenbugs
description: The new version of the Frankenbugs Server modpack, outside the Curseforge ecosystem as much as possible. Now in 20.1 forge beta. Pretty stable at this point.
body:
A first attempt at putting together alternative versions of the Frankenbugs Server modpack, outside the Curseforge ecosystem as much as possible. 

19.2 packs are experimental. Do not download. (Or do, I'm not your boss.)
